name: One Stop Auto Repair
tagline: Honest, fair auto repair on Piner Road — the Santa Rosa shop that fixes what you need and nothing you don’t.
seoDescription: One Stop Auto Repair is a Santa Rosa, CA auto repair shop at 1688 Piner Rd serving drivers Monday through Saturday with honest, fairly priced service and a 4.5-star rating.

contact.address: 1688 Piner Rd, Suite A, Santa Rosa, CA 95403

sections.heading: The Santa Rosa mechanic that won’t sell you what you don’t need
sections.subheading: One Stop Auto Repair on Piner Road has built its reputation the old-fashioned way — honest diagnoses, fair prices, and owners who tell you straight what your car actually needs. 4.5 stars from the people who trust them with it.
badges: On Piner Road in Santa Rosa

sections.heading: A shop built on a straight answer
body: There’s a reason drivers keep coming back to One Stop: you get a straight answer. The owners are known around Santa Rosa as honest and fair — they tell you what’s wrong, what it’ll take to fix it, and what can wait, without the upsell.

It’s a full-service shop for everyday cars and trucks — oil changes, diagnostics, and the repairs that keep a vehicle on the road — run by people who’d rather earn a repeat customer than win one big ticket.

sections.heading: Service that keeps you on the road

items.title: Oil & Routine Maintenance
items.description: Oil changes and scheduled service to keep small things from becoming big ones.

items.title: Diagnostics
items.description: Straight-talk diagnosis of warning lights, noises, and the things that just feel off.

items.title: Brakes & Suspension
items.description: Brake service and front-end work so the car stops and rides the way it should.

items.title: Engine & Drivability
items.description: Repairs for the running problems that strand you — done once, done right.

items.title: Fleet & Everyday Cars
items.description: Reliable service for daily drivers, trucks, and small fleets around Santa Rosa.

items.title: Honest Estimates
items.description: A clear estimate before the work starts — what you need, and what can wait.

items.title: Tell us what’s going on
items.body: Call or stop by Piner Road and describe what the car is doing.

items.title: We diagnose it straight
items.body: We find the real problem and tell you plainly what it needs.

items.title: You approve the work
items.body: A fair estimate up front — nothing happens without your OK.

items.title: Back on the road
items.body: We fix it right and stand behind the work.

items.title: Honest by reputation
items.body: Known around Santa Rosa for fair prices and no unnecessary work.

items.title: 4.5 stars and climbing
items.body: A rating earned one straight answer at a time.

items.title: Open six days a week
items.body: Monday through Saturday, so service fits a real schedule.

items.title: Right on Piner Road
items.body: Easy to reach in northwest Santa Rosa.

sections.heading: Car acting up?
sections.body: Bring it to One Stop Auto Repair at 1688 Piner Rd, Suite A. Call (707) 536-9053 for an honest look.

items.a: We’re open Monday through Saturday, 8:30am to 6pm, and closed Sunday.
Call ahead at (707) 536-9053 and we’ll get you scheduled — drop-ins are welcome too.

items.q: Will you tell me if something can wait?
items.a: Always. We tell you what needs doing now and what can hold, so you can plan.

items.q: What kinds of vehicles do you service?
items.a: Everyday cars and trucks, plus small fleets around Santa Rosa.
